title: 「Instead of」句型
titleEn: Using instead of to show one choice in place of another

omissions: The Important Details, comparison section and Benefits explanations are provided mainly in Chinese, with English examples; the stored English explanations are faithful editorial translations.
The PDF title has no separate English subtitle; titleEn is an editorial translation.
Physical page 20 is blank and is retained in pageCount but omitted from lessonPages, exercisePages and answerPages.

formula: Subject + verb + chosen thing/action + instead of + replaced thing/action

formulas.formula: Subject + verb + chosen thing/action + instead of + replaced thing/action
Instead of + noun / object pronoun / verb-ing, + subject + verb + other information

example: When I was a kid, I chose to study biology instead of arts.
exampleZh: 我小時候選擇讀生物，而不是藝術。

examples.en: When I was a kid, I chose to study biology instead of arts.
examples.zh: 我小時候選擇讀生物，而不是藝術。
examples.highlight: When I was a kid, I chose to study biology instead of arts.

zh: instead of 用來把選擇的人、事物或行動，與沒有選擇的人、事物或行動放在同一句中作比較。
本練習的目標只包括 instead of + noun / object pronoun / verb-ing。

rules.en: Instead of may be followed by a noun or noun phrase.
rules.zh: Instead of 後面可以接名詞或名詞詞組。
examples: I ordered tea instead of coffee.
The class used a video instead of a long explanation.

rules.en: When a pronoun follows instead of, use its object form.
rules.zh: Instead of 後面接代名詞時，要使用受詞形式。
examples: The coach chose Nina instead of me.
me, not I; him, not he; her, not she; us, not we; them, not they

rules.en: When an action follows instead of, use the -ing form because instead of is a prepositional phrase.
rules.zh: Instead of 後面接行動時，動詞要加 -ing。Instead of 是介詞，因此後面的動詞通常要變成 verb-ing。
examples: Correct: I walked instead of taking the bus.
Incorrect: I walked instead of take the bus.

rules.en: The two options before and after instead of should correspond: noun with noun, action with action, or manner with manner.
rules.zh: 前後兩個選項應該互相對應：名詞對名詞、行動對行動、方式對方式。
examples: She chose tea instead of coffee.
She stayed at home instead of going out.
We sent the notice by email instead of by post.

rules.en: Instead of may appear at the beginning of a sentence; normally add a comma after the introductory phrase.
rules.zh: Instead of 可以放在句子前面。當 Instead of 片語放在句首時，後面一般要加逗號。
examples: Instead of taking a taxi, Oliver walked home.

rules.en: Instead of is followed by a noun, object pronoun or verb-ing and directly compares two choices in the same sentence.
rules.zh: Instead of 是介詞片語，接名詞、受詞代名詞或 verb-ing，通常在同一句中直接比較兩個選項。
examples: I walked home instead of taking a taxi.

rules.en: Instead is a sentence adverb that connects two complete ideas. It normally begins a new sentence and is followed by a comma; it cannot be followed directly by a noun or verb-ing.
rules.zh: Instead 是句子副詞，連接兩個完整意思。它通常放在新句子的開頭，後面加逗號，不可以直接接名詞或 verb-ing。
examples: I did not take a taxi. Instead, I walked home.

rules.en: Rather is a sentence adverb that corrects or restates an earlier idea more accurately, often meaning “more precisely” or “rather X than Y”.
rules.zh: Rather 是句子副詞，通常用來修正或更準確地表達前面的意思，可表示「更準確地說」、「更恰當地說」或「與其說是 X，不如說是 Y」。
examples: Life should not be about others. Rather, it is about how we choose to live our lives.

rules.en: This exercise covers only instead of + noun / object pronoun / verb-ing.
rules.zh: 本練習的目標只包括 instead of + noun / object pronoun / verb-ing。

benefits.en: It clearly shows what you chose. The chosen option and the rejected option appear in the same sentence, so the reader can understand the decision immediately.
benefits.zh: 清楚顯示你選了甚麼。這個句型可以把「採用的選項」和「沒有採用的選項」放在同一句中，讀者可以立即明白你的決定。

benefits.en: It combines two short sentences into one. The second version avoids repeating two subjects and expresses the meaning more directly.
benefits.zh: 把兩個短句合併成一句。第二個版本不需要重複寫兩個主語，表達更加直接。

benefits.en: It is suitable for discussing choices, habits and solutions, including chosen objects, actions, methods and alternatives.
benefits.zh: 適合談論選擇、習慣和解決方法。你可以使用這個句型說明選擇了哪件物品、採取了哪個行動、改用了哪種方法，或建議別人不要做甚麼而應該做甚麼。

benefits.en: It avoids repeatedly using not, but and two complete sentences, connecting related actions more naturally.
benefits.zh: 避免重複使用 not、but 和兩個完整句子，讓兩個相關行動連接得更自然。

benefits.en: It lets you vary the beginning of a sentence. Placing the Instead of phrase first emphasises the approach that was not chosen and increases sentence variety.
benefits.zh: 可以改變句子的開頭。把 Instead of 片語放在句首，可以先強調沒有採用的做法，增加句式變化。

sourceOmissions: The Important Details, comparison section and Benefits explanations are provided mainly in Chinese, with English examples; the stored English explanations are faithful editorial translations.
The PDF title has no separate English subtitle; titleEn is an editorial translation.
Physical page 20 is blank and is retained in pageCount but omitted from lessonPages, exercisePages and answerPages.

en: Rewrite each sentence using instead of to show that one person, thing or action was chosen in place of another.
You may use instead of + noun, instead of + object pronoun, instead of + verb-ing, or Instead of + noun / verb-ing, + complete sentence.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 instead of 改寫以下句子，表示選擇了一個人、事物或行動，而沒有選擇另一個。
你可以使用 instead of + 名詞、instead of + 受詞代名詞、instead of + verb-ing，或 Instead of + 名詞／verb-ing，+ 完整句子。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: I did not take the bus. I walked to school.
questions.promptZh: 我沒有乘搭巴士。我步行上學。
questions.answer: I walked to school instead of taking the bus.
questions.answerZh: 我步行上學，而沒有乘搭巴士。
questions.highlight: I walked to school instead of taking the bus.

questions.prompt: Lily chose tea, not coffee, at breakfast.
questions.promptZh: 莉莉早餐時選擇了茶，而不是咖啡。
questions.answer: Lily chose tea instead of coffee at breakfast.
questions.answerZh: 莉莉早餐時選擇了茶，而不是咖啡。
questions.highlight: Lily chose tea instead of coffee at breakfast.

questions.prompt: Ben did not play computer games after dinner. He read a book.

questions.answerZh: 本晚飯後看書，而沒有玩電腦遊戲。

questions.highlight: Instead of making a quick decision based on one complaint, the committee reviewed all the evidence.

questions.prompt: The teacher did not simply give the correct answer. She asked questions that helped the class find it.
questions.promptZh: 老師沒有直接說出正確答案。她提出問題，幫助全班找出答案。
questions.answer: The teacher asked questions to help the class find the answer instead of simply giving it to them.
questions.answerZh: 老師提出問題幫助全班找出答案，而不是直接把答案告訴他們。
questions.highlight: The teacher asked questions to help the class find the answer instead of simply giving it to them.

questions.prompt: The travellers did not change their whole plan. Instead, they adjusted the departure time.
questions.promptZh: 旅客沒有更改整個計劃。反而，他們調整了出發時間。
questions.answer: Instead of changing their whole plan, the travellers adjusted the departure time.
questions.answerZh: 旅客沒有更改整個計劃，而是調整了出發時間。
questions.highlight: Instead of changing their whole plan, the travellers adjusted the departure time.

questions.prompt: The organisation did not replace experienced staff with machines. It used technology to support their work.
questions.promptZh: 機構沒有用機器取代經驗豐富的員工，而是運用科技支援他們的工作。
questions.answer: The organisation used technology to support experienced staff instead of replacing them with machines.
questions.answerZh: 機構運用科技支援經驗豐富的員工，而不是用機器取代他們。
questions.highlight: The organisation used technology to support experienced staff instead of replacing them with machines.

questions.prompt: The project team did not hide the delay. They informed the client early and proposed a revised schedule.
questions.promptZh: 項目團隊沒有隱瞞延誤，而是及早通知客戶，並提出修訂後的時間表。
questions.answer: The project team informed the client early and proposed a revised schedule instead of hiding the delay.
questions.answerZh: 項目團隊及早通知客戶，並提出修訂後的時間表，而沒有隱瞞延誤。
questions.highlight: The project team informed the client early and proposed a revised schedule instead of hiding the delay.
